switching._comment_lambda: lambda=0 gives pure lazy switching Eq.(20). lambda>0 is robust variant.

kalman._comment: Uses zeta = 1 - exp(-T_W/tau_bar) where tau_bar is harmonic mean of tau_up, tau_down. Process noise var = sigma_v_sq (paper Eq.11).

ar1._comment: Two independent AR(1) channels per node: 'cmp' (FLOPs/sec) and 'mem' (bytes). RLS sliding window refines each online.

latency_model._comment: 'sum' matches paper Eq.(6); 'max' uses pipeline steady-state; 'mixed' = prefill sum + decode max.

weight_residency._comment: 'strict': node holds only current-b blocks; boundary expansion triggers L_n(Delta). Paper Eq.(7) is strict.
